<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="lab-topology" name="Lab Topology"> <mxGraphModel dx="1759" dy="1185" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="750" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="source-vnet" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;arcSize=6;dashed=0;" value="Source VNet (W365 Side)
10.100.0.0/24" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="580" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w365-subnet" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=5;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;" value="W365 Subnet
10.100.0.0/26" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="170" x="50" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="test-vm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0078D4;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#005a9e;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=0;" value="Test VM
Windows 11
(simulates W365)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="120" x="75" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="udr" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0078D4;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#005a9e;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=0;" value="UDR
0.0.0.0/0 → ILB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="85" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c8000v-subnet" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=5;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;" value="C8000V Subnet
10.100.0.64/27" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="250" width="350" x="240" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ilb" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0078D4;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#005a9e;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=0;" value="ILB
HA Ports
Protocol: All | Port: 0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="115" x="265" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c8000v1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DD5900;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b34700;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=0;" value="C8000V-1
D4s_v5 + Public IP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="420" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="c8000v2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DD5900;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b34700;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=0;" value="C8000V-2
D4s_v5 + Public IP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="420" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="snat1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666666;" value="SNAT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="40" x="560" y="127" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="snat2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666666;" value="SNAT" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="40" x="560" y="207" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="src-bastion-subnet" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=5;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;" value="Bastion Subnet
10.100.0.128/27" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="170" x="50" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="src-bastion" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0078D4;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#005a9e;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=0;" value="Azure Bastion" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="120" x="75" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dest-vnet" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;arcSize=6;" value="Destination VNet (Zscaler Mock)
10.200.0.0/24" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="360" x="850" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nva-subnet" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=5;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;" value="NVA Subnet
10.200.0.0/27" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="300" x="880" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linux-nva" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#107C10;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0b5a0b;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=0;" value="Linux NVA
Ubuntu 22.04
GRE termination
+ Public IP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="150" x="950" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dest-bastion-subnet" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=5;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;" value="Bastion Subnet
10.200.0.128/27" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="300" x="880" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dest-bastion" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0078D4;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#005a9e;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=0;" value="Azure Bastion" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="120" x="970" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow1" edge="1" parent="1" source="test-vm" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeColor=#0078D4;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ilb" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow1-label" connectable="0" parent="flow1" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0078D4;" value="UDR" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="-5" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow2a" edge="1" parent="1" source="ilb" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeColor=#0078D4;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.25;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="c8000v1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flow2b" edge="1" parent="1" source="ilb" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeColor=#0078D4;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.75;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="c8000v2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gre1" edge="1" parent="1" source="c8000v1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;startArrow=block;startFill=1;strokeColor=#FF6600;strokeWidth=3;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.35;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="linux-nva" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gre1-label" connectable="0" parent="gre1" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=bottom;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#FF6600;" value="GRE Tunnel 1
172.16.0.0/30" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.05" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="-8" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gre2" edge="1" parent="1" source="c8000v2" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;startArrow=block;startFill=1;strokeColor=#FF6600;strokeWidth=3;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.65;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="linux-nva" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gre2-label" connectable="0" parent="gre2" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=top;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#FF6600;" value="GRE Tunnel 2
172.16.0.4/30" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.05" as="geometry"> <mxPoint y="8" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pip-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#FF6600;" value="over Public IPs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="100" x="680" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;strokeWidth=1;arcSize=8;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="520" x="30" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend-title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Legend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="50" x="40" y="532" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg-flow-line" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;strokeColor=#0078D4;strokeWidth=2;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="50" y="565" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="110" y="565" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg-flow-text" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=10;" value="Traffic flow (ILB path)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="130" x="115" y="555" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg-gre-line" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;startArrow=block;startFill=1;strokeColor=#FF6600;strokeWidth=3;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="280" y="565" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="340" y="565" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leg-gre-text" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=10;" value="GRE tunnel (over public IPs)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="170" x="345" y="555" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="path-summary" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="Traffic path: Test VM → UDR → ILB (HA Ports) → C8000V → GRE tunnel → Linux NVA" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="480" x="300" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
